CustomField.formula: CASE( $Profile.Name , 'Scotia Bank Community User', Scotia_Open_Cases__c, 'Scotia Bank Community User Readonly', Scotia_Open_Cases__c, 'New Scotia Bank Login Community User', Scotia_Open_Cases__c, 'New Scotia Bank Login Community User Readonly', Scotia_Open_Cases__c, CFG_Open_Cases__c )
CustomField.label: DT_Number of Open Assignments
